summary.short_summary: This chapter introduces the main ideas of We Distribute Yet Things Multiply in mathematics.
summary.detailed_summary: This chapter for Class 8 mathematics explains the core concepts of We Distribute Yet Things Multiply. It is intended as a structured study summary for CBSE learners.
